# ADR-XXXX: <short decision title>

- **Status:** Proposed
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** <who>
- **Supersedes:** — (or ADR-YYYY)
- **Superseded by:** — (set when a later ADR replaces this one)

## Context

What forces are at play? What problem are we solving?

## Decision

The choice we are making, stated plainly in active voice ("We will …").

## Consequences

What becomes easier, harder, or constrained as a result. Include the trigger
conditions under which this decision should be revisited.

## Alternatives considered

- **<option>** — why not.
